title: justicia unyorensis
intro: Justicia unyorensis, also known as the Unyore Justicia, is a plant species native to East Africa, specifically in Kenya and Tanzania. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and soothing digestive issues. Justicia unyorensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves can also be used in traditional herbal preparations such as salves and creams.
